hero.headline: Streamline Your Team's Productivity with Flowdesk
hero.subheadline: Intelligent project management that transforms how remote teams collaborate, automate, and achieve more.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Modern digital workspace with abstract holographic UI elements, showing multiple screens with project management dashboards, soft blue and purple gradient background, clean minimalist design

features.title: Smart Collaboration
features.description: Break down communication barriers with our AI-powered collaboration tools. Real-time messaging, integrated video conferencing, and contextual task sharing ensure your team stays connected, no matter where they are.
features.icon_prompt: Digital network connection icon with interconnected nodes, glowing blue lines, minimalist tech style

features.title: Workflow Automation
features.description: Eliminate repetitive tasks and reduce human error. Flowdesk's intelligent automation learns from your team's patterns, creating custom workflows that save time and increase efficiency across projects.
features.icon_prompt: Robotic arm connecting digital workflow elements, clean line art, gradient purple and blue colors

features.title: Advanced Analytics
features.description: Gain unprecedented insights into your team's performance. Our real-time analytics dashboard provides actionable metrics, helping you identify bottlenecks, predict project risks, and optimize team productivity.
features.icon_prompt: Holographic analytics dashboard with rising graph lines, data visualization elements, modern tech aesthetic

footer.mission: Flowdesk empowers distributed teams to work smarter, not harder. Our mission is to break down geographical barriers and create a seamless, intelligent workspace for the modern workforce.
